shared_properties: Six-frame projectile atlas structure and left-to-right travel readability.
Bright center focal point and alpha blended fringe.
Lane-safe silhouette sized for fast timing reads.
differences: Frame size contracts to 30x30 px to fit the narrow bolt body.
Core changes into an angular zigzag bolt with short branch sparks.
Animation speed increases to 14 fps and palette shifts to gold-white energy.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the thunder projectile and keep the same gameplay transform path as other projectile variants.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/projectile_thunder_fly_6f_14fps.png through AssetServer and register the atlas under projectile_thunder_fly_6f_14fps.
runtime_notes: Thunder projectile keeps the narrowest silhouette to match the hardest timing window.
Frame pivot stays centered so the gameplay hit box remains deterministic.
Rapid flash changes must remain below a strobe feel at 14 fps.

context.usage: Thunder projectile used for the fastest lane checks at 320 px per second and for high-risk reflect timing.

shape.silhouette: Angular bolt core with sharp side sparks and a short flash trail.

specs.lighting: White center flashes through gold edges with a brief navy shadow gap between sparks.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 180x30 px with six 30x30 frames.
Leading bolt tip stays the brightest pixel cluster in every frame.
Branch sparks remain inside the 30x30 frame and do not widen the collision read beyond 24 px.
